name: Butter

pros.title: simple traditional fat
pros.explanation: This gives butter a cleaner identity than heavily processed fat substitutes.

pros.title: very strong culinary usefulness
pros.explanation: Butter has real kitchen legitimacy and practical use that matters in this category.

pros.title: can fit as a moderate traditional fat
pros.explanation: The editorial position here is that butter belongs as a flawed but legitimate middle-ground fat rather than a bottom-tier industrial product.

cons.title: saturated fat is a major drawback
cons.explanation: This is the main reason butter cannot be an elite oils-and-fats food.

cons.title: cholesterol is high
cons.explanation: A second meaningful strike against the fat profile.

cons.title: fat profile is clearly weaker than top-tier oils
cons.explanation: Butter is not competing with the best oils on chemistry alone.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate placeholders for tuning only.
Configured intentionally as a flawed but legitimate middle-ground fat anchor.
